items.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Oracle, Novo Nordisk, Hims & Hers Health, Kroger and more
items.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in premarket trading.

items.title: Digital employees, AI bootcamps: America's oldest bank is spending billions on tech
items.description: The race to integrate artificial intelligence is on among the banks. BNY now has 134 "digital employees," who work alongside humans.

items.title: S&P is already predicting China's property slump will be worse than it expected this year
items.description: S&P Global Ratings said China's primary real estate sales will likely drop by 10% to 14% this year, steeper than the decline predicted back in October...

items.title: Tech giants in China sold off alongside their U.S. peers last week. How to play it
items.description: While Chinese tech stocks have sold off along with U.S. names in the last several days, analysts say there's a fundamental difference.

items.title: China's Luckin Coffee opens first high-end store as it takes on Starbucks
items.description: The Chinese coffee upstart is expanding from budget drinks into the premium market with a new flagship store.
